behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names DedentMarkers, the package path markup/goldmark/hugocontext, contentToC in hugolib/page__content.go, AssertNoRenderShortcodesArtifacts, and TestRenderShortcodesCodeBlock — all test assertions map to these.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and required behavior/signatures but doesn't prescribe implementation details like specific regex or line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check function signature, behavior on inputs, and grep for symbol presence — multiple valid implementations (regex, line-by-line scan, etc.) would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests compile and run Go programs calling DedentMarkers, run `go test` for TestRenderShortcodesCodeBlock, and execute go build/vet.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning input unchanged would fail the strip tests; a stub returning empty would fail the preserve tests; integration test requires real fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All four behavior bullets in instruction (strip spaces, strip tabs, preserve non-markers, multiple markers) have corresponding tests, plus integration and helper presence tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with docstrings describing purpose and grouped logically (dedent behaviors, integration, pass-to-pass).

no_typos.reason: Paths, function names, and commands are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the package and the integration file (hugolib/page__content.go contentToC) but this is required API surface, not a line-level buggy hint.
